div.class: bg-black-75 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center text-center

strong.span:
WE BRING YOU PERFORMANCE YOU'VE 
BEEN DREAMING OF,ON AND OF THE TRUCK

div.class: bg-black-75 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center text-center

section.class: s_references o_cc o_colored_level pb0 pt16 o_cc5

div.style: display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; align-items: center;

select.style: padding: 12px 20px; background: #2a2a2a; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; min-width: 120px; transition: all 0.3s ease;
padding: 12px 20px; background: #2a2a2a; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; min-width: 120px; transition: all 0.3s ease;
padding: 12px 20px; background: #2a2a2a; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; min-width: 120px; transition: all 0.3s ease;
padding: 12px 20px; background: #2a2a2a; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; min-width: 120px; transition: all 0.3s ease;

button.style: padding: 12px 30px; background: #FF0000; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; transition: all 0.3s ease;

section.class: s_adventure o_colored_level s_parallax_no_overflow_hidden pb112 pt72 o_cc o_cc4 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center o_bg_img_origin_border_box

span.font: Yokohama team is dedicated to provide the most friendly and professional service to
our customers and offer them constantly the excellent quality tires adequate to the

section.class: s_references o_cc o_colored_level pb0 pt16 o_cc5
s_striped_top o_cc o_colored_level pb0 o_cc5 pt48

div.p: The Geolandar X-CV is built with technological advances combining optimized all-season performance with a refined quiet ride; exactly what your luxurious SUV needs.

section.class: s_striped_top o_cc o_cc5 o_colored_level pb0 pt0

a.t-att-data-seller-products: json.dumps([{'id': p.id, 'name': p.name, 'price': p.list_price, 'categ': p.categ_id.name if p.categ_id else 'Product', 'image': image_data_uri(p.image_1024) if p.image_1024 else '/web/static/images/placeholder.png'} for p in seller.product_tmpl_ids[:3]])
a.style: transition: all 0.3s ease; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 3px solid; padding-bottom: 10px; margin: 0 15px;
a.t-att-style: 'transition: all 0.3s ease; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 3px solid #FF0000; padding-bottom: 10px; color: #FF0000; margin: 0 15px;' if seller_index == 0 else 'transition: all 0.3s ease; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 3px solid transparent; padding-bottom: 10px; color: #999; margin: 0 15px;'

div.style: text-align: center; padding: 20px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02); border-radius: 8px; transition: all 0.3s ease; margin-bottom: 30px;
color: #FF0000; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 10px;

height: 250px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,0,0,0.05) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 100%); border-radius: 4px; margin: 20px 0; overflow: hidden;

img.style: max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; object-fit: contain; transition: transform 0.3s ease;
max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; object-fit: contain; transition: transform 0.3s ease;

a.style: background-color: #FF0000; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 12px; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: all 0.3s ease;

t.div: No products in first brand. Please add products to your brands.
No best sellers configured. Please add brands in the admin panel (Website > Best Sellers).

a.style: background-color: rgb(255, 0, 0); padding: 12px 40px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 4px; margin-right: 15px; text-decoration: none;
background-color: white; padding: 12px 40px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none;

section.class: s_dynamic_snippet_products oe_website_sale o_wsale_products_opt_actions_onhover o_wsale_products_opt_img_secondary_show o_wsale_products_opt_layout_catalog o_wsale_products_opt_thumb_cover s_dynamic pt64 pb64 s_product_product_products_item o_colored_level o_dynamic_snippet_loading
s_dynamic_snippet_content oe_unremovable oe_unmovable o_not_editable col s_col_no_resize o_colored_level o_cc o_cc1

div.class: missing_option_warning alert alert-info fade show d-print-none rounded-0 d-none

div.div: Your Dynamic Snippet will be displayed here... This message is displayed because you did not provide enough options to retrieve its content.

span.strong: engine oil that fits your vehicle

div.class: o_grid_item o_grid_item_image text-center o_colored_level g-col-lg-8 g-height-3 o_grid_item_image_contain col-lg-8

div.style: display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; align-items: center;

select.style: padding: 12px 20px; background: #2a2a2a; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; min-width: 120px; transition: all 0.3s ease;
padding: 12px 20px; background: #2a2a2a; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; min-width: 120px; transition: all 0.3s ease;
padding: 12px 20px; background: #2a2a2a; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; min-width: 120px; transition: all 0.3s ease;
padding: 12px 20px; background: #2a2a2a; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; min-width: 120px; transition: all 0.3s ease;

button.style: padding: 12px 30px; background: #FF0000; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; transition: all 0.3s ease;

div.class: pb32 text-center o_colored_level col-lg-2 offset-lg-1 pt0

img.style: transform: translateX(-7.9%) translateY(-0.5%) scaleX(0.78) scaleY(0.78); animation-play-state: paused; transition: none; width: 50% !important;

section.data-map-address: 8000 Marina Blvd, Suite 300 Brisbane California (US) United States

div.class: missing_option_warning alert alert-info rounded-0 fade show d-none d-print-none

div.div: An address must be specified for a map to be embedded
